                EventTarget.prototype.addEventListener = function (eventName, eventHandler, useCapture) {
                    if (eventName === "resize") {
                        originalAddEventListener.call(this, eventName, function (event) {
                            if (oldWidth === window.innerWidth) {
                                return;
                            }
                            else if (oldWidth !== window.innerWidth) {
                                oldWidth = window.innerWidth;
                            }
                            if (eventHandler.handleEvent) {
                                eventHandler.handleEvent.call(this, event);
                            }
                            else {
                                eventHandler.call(this, event);
                            };
                        }, useCapture);
                    }
                    else {
                        originalAddEventListener.call(this, eventName, eventHandler, useCapture);
                    };
                };
            };

body #load {
  display: block;
  height: 100%;
  overflow: hidden;
  position: fixed;
  width: 100%;
  z-index: 9901;
  opacity: 1;
  visibility: visible;
  transition: all .35s ease-out;
}
.load-wrap {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  background-position: center center;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  text-align: center;
}
.load-wrap > svg {
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%,-50%);
}
#load {
  background-color: #ffffff;
}
.uil-default rect:not(.bk) {
  fill: #fdc134;
}
.uil-ring > path {
  fill: #fdc134;
}
.ring-loader .circle {
  fill: #fdc134;
}
.ring-loader .moving-circle {
  fill: #fdc134;
}
.uil-hourglass .glass {
  stroke: #fdc134;
}
.uil-hourglass .sand {
  fill: #fdc134;
}

<div class="post-entry-content">

	<h3 class="ele-entry-title"><a href="https://josenisraeltours.net/2022/11/19/elementor-43980/" title="La Tumba de los Patriarcas" rel="bookmark">La Tumba de los Patriarcas</a></h3><div class="entry-meta"><a href="https://josenisraeltours.net/2022/11/19/" title="7:00 am" class="meta-item data-link" rel="bookmark"><time class="entry-date updated" datetime="2022-11-19T07:00:36+00:00">November 19, 2022</time></a></div><div class="entry-excerpt"><p>Hebron – La tumba de los Patriarcas Este lugar fue construido por el rey Herodes el grande, igual que Jerusalem a una escala un poco menor. Se puede ver aqui exactamente como era la muralla en la esplanada del templor de Jerusalem.</p>
</div><a href="https://josenisraeltours.net/2022/11/19/elementor-43980/" target="" aria-label="Read more about La Tumba de los Patriarcas" class="box-button elementor-button elementor-size-xs">Continuar<i aria-hidden="true" class="elementor-button-icon dt-icon-the7-arrow-552"></i></a>

body #load {
  display: block;
  height: 100%;
  overflow: hidden;
  position: fixed;
  width: 100%;
  z-index: 9901;
  opacity: 1;
  visibility: visible;
  transition: all .35s ease-out;
}
.load-wrap {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  background-position: center center;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  text-align: center;
}
.load-wrap > svg {
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%,-50%);
}
#load {
  background-color: #ffffff;
}
.uil-default rect:not(.bk) {
  fill: #fdc134;
}
.uil-ring > path {
  fill: #fdc134;
}
.ring-loader .circle {
  fill: #fdc134;
}
.ring-loader .moving-circle {
  fill: #fdc134;
}
.uil-hourglass .glass {
  stroke: #fdc134;
}
.uil-hourglass .sand {
  fill: #fdc134;
}

<div class="post-entry-content">

	<h3 class="ele-entry-title"><a href="https://josenisraeltours.net/2022/07/13/con-el-lugar-de-su-presencia-en-israel/" title="con “El Lugar De su Presencia” en Israel" rel="bookmark">con “El Lugar De su Presencia” en Israel</a></h3><div class="entry-meta"><a href="https://josenisraeltours.net/2022/07/13/" title="12:57 pm" class="meta-item data-link" rel="bookmark"><time class="entry-date updated" datetime="2022-07-13T12:57:48+00:00">July 13, 2022</time></a></div><div class="entry-excerpt"><p>Unos dias de ensueño por Jerusalem con un grupo maravilloso que me entrego su confianza y que me devovio el amor en cada minudo de su estadia. Muchos lugares que quedaron en el tintero para el proximo viaje. </p>

<figure class="wp-block-gallery columns-1 is-cropped wp-block-gallery-1 is-layout-flex wp-block-gallery-is-layout-flex"><ul class="blocks-gallery-grid"><li class="blocks-gallery-item"><figure><img decoding="async" width="938" height="1024" src="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/JosEnIsrael-1-938x1024.png" alt="120X131 Logo" data-id="43481" data-full-url="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/JosEnIsrael-1-e1632809360420.png" data-link="https://josenisraeltours.net/josenisrael-2/" class="wp-image-43481"/></figure></li></ul></figure>
</section><section id="block-20" class="widget widget_block widget_text">
<p>Somos un grupo de Guias de Turismo en Tierra Santa que te llevaran a todos los lugares que aman. </p>
</section><section id="block-22" class="widget widget_block widget_text">
<p>Este es un sitio donde leer sobre Israel de primera mano.  </p>
</section><section id="block-23" class="widget widget_block widget_text">
<p>Te contaremos de la historia, la geografia y de su gente. la parte mas importante. Los cultos, la gastronomia, la arquitectura, la agricultura y los paisajes de una tierra que por mileneos es preciada.</p>

				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>

body #load {
  display: block;
  height: 100%;
  overflow: hidden;
  position: fixed;
  width: 100%;
  z-index: 9901;
  opacity: 1;
  visibility: visible;
  transition: all .35s ease-out;
}
.load-wrap {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  background-position: center center;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  text-align: center;
}
.load-wrap > svg {
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%,-50%);
}

  background-color: #ffffff;
}

}

  fill: #fdc134;

				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>

<article id="post-103" class="circle-fancy-style post-103 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail category-viajes tag-jerusalem category-229 description-off">

	<div class="post-thumbnail"><div class="fancy-date"><a title="7:53 am" href="https://josenisraeltours.net/2021/09/07/"><span class="entry-month">Sep</span><span class="entry-date updated">7</span><span class="entry-year">2021</span></a></div><span class="fancy-categories"><a href="https://josenisraeltours.net/category/viajes/" rel="category tag">Viajes</a></span><img fetchpriority="high" class="preload-me lazy-load" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%202560%201280'%2F%3E" data-src="/wp-content/uploads/2021/08/20191122093203_IMG_5053-scaled-2560x1280.jpg" data-srcset="/wp-content/uploads/2021/08/20191122093203_IMG_5053-scaled-2560x1280.jpg 2560w" width="2560" height="1280"  title="20191122093203_IMG_5053" alt="" /></div><div class="entry-content"><p>Ocho dias enTierra Santa es el programa perfecto para conocer los lugares por donde pasaron los profetas, los reyes, Jesus de Nazaret y muchos otros. El lugar donde veras los pasos de ejercitos antiguos y batallas que forjaron el mundo en que hoy vivimos. La cuna de las religiones monoteistas y el lugar donde hoy se construye el futuro.</p>
<h2>Dia 1 Yafo, Apolonia y Tel Aviv</h2>
<h3>Yafo</h3>
<p><a href="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20201212_100822-1-scaled.jpg" data-elementor-open-lightbox="yes" data-elementor-lightbox-title="20201212_100822"><br />
<img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="1024" height="1024" src="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20201212_100822-1-1024x1024.jpg" alt="" loading="lazy" srcset="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20201212_100822-1-1024x1024.jpg 1024w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20201212_100822-1-300x300.jpg 300w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20201212_100822-1-150x150.jpg 150w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20201212_100822-1-768x768.jpg 768w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20201212_100822-1-1536x1536.jpg 1536w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20201212_100822-1-2048x2048.jpg 2048w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20201212_100822-1-600x600.jpg 600w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20201212_100822-1-200x200.jpg 200w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 1024px) 100vw, 1024px">								</a><br />
<a href="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20201212_114830-1-scaled.jpg" data-elementor-open-lightbox="yes" data-elementor-lightbox-title="20201212_114830"><br />
<img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="1024" height="1024" src="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20201212_114830-1-1024x1024.jpg" alt="" loading="lazy" srcset="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20201212_114830-1-1024x1024.jpg 1024w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20201212_114830-1-300x300.jpg 300w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20201212_114830-1-150x150.jpg 150w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20201212_114830-1-768x768.jpg 768w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20201212_114830-1-1536x1536.jpg 1536w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20201212_114830-1-2048x2048.jpg 2048w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20201212_114830-1-600x600.jpg 600w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20201212_114830-1-200x200.jpg 200w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 1024px) 100vw, 1024px">								</a></p>
<p>De las ciudades mas antiguas del mundo, el Faraon Ramses paso por aqui, hace dos mil años Pedro el discipulo elejido para seguir los pasos de Jesus de Nazaret y tambien Napoleon Bonaparte. Hoy tu…</p>
<h3>Apolonia</h3>
<p><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="576" height="1024" src="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210908_103522-576x1024.jpg" alt="" loading="lazy" srcset="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210908_103522-576x1024.jpg 576w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210908_103522-169x300.jpg 169w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210908_103522-768x1365.jpg 768w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210908_103522-864x1536.jpg 864w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210908_103522-1152x2048.jpg 1152w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210908_103522-600x1067.jpg 600w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210908_103522-scaled.jpg 1440w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 576px) 100vw, 576px"></p>
<p>Las ciudad del dios Apolo que fortifico Luis V en el siglo XII, con su pequeño puerto y su ciudadela inespugnable.</p>
<p>El legado que ya venia del tiempo de los fenicios que fundaron el enclave, muchos pasaron por aqui hasta que la conquista del Sultan mameluco Bibars destruyo todo difinitivamente junto con todas las ciudades costeras.</p>
<p>“Aqui del mar no vuelve nadie” y si vuelve tendra que volver a construir desde la primera piedra.</p>
<p>Ocho siglos hasta que vuelven por mar los judios y construyen las ciudades costeras, hoy los lugares mas preciados de Israel.</p>
<h3>Tel Aviv</h3>
<p>La urbe costera de Israel que nunca duerme.</p>
<h3>La colonia de los alemanes templarios de Sarona entre los rascacielos de cemento y vidrio.</h3>
<p>Se puede convivir recordando el pasado. El barrio antiguo que una ves fue la novedad del lugar, a los pies de los rascacielos modernos de cemento y vidrio le dan otra vida al lugar y un parque especial que visitan todos.</p>
<p><a href="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210608_153915-scaled.jpg" data-elementor-open-lightbox="yes" data-elementor-lightbox-title="20210608_153915"><br />
<img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="576" height="1024" src="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210608_153915-576x1024.jpg" alt="" loading="lazy" srcset="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210608_153915-576x1024.jpg 576w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210608_153915-169x300.jpg 169w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210608_153915-768x1365.jpg 768w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210608_153915-864x1536.jpg 864w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210608_153915-1152x2048.jpg 1152w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210608_153915-600x1067.jpg 600w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210608_153915-scaled.jpg 1440w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 576px) 100vw, 576px">								</a></p>
<h2>Dia 2 Cesaria y Haifa</h2>
<h3>Cesaria</h3>
<p>La ciudad del rey Herodes.</p>
<p><a href="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20200527_094422-scaled.jpg" data-elementor-open-lightbox="yes" data-elementor-lightbox-title="20200527_094422"><br />
<img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="1024" height="1024" src="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20200527_094422-1024x1024.jpg" alt="" loading="lazy" srcset="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20200527_094422-1024x1024.jpg 1024w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20200527_094422-300x300.jpg 300w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20200527_094422-150x150.jpg 150w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20200527_094422-768x768.jpg 768w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20200527_094422-1536x1536.jpg 1536w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20200527_094422-2048x2048.jpg 2048w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20200527_094422-600x600.jpg 600w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20200527_094422-200x200.jpg 200w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 1024px) 100vw, 1024px">								</a></p>
<p>El gran rey Herodes, el constructor, fundo la ciudad de Cesaria en nombre del Cesar Augusto con un puerto de aguas profundas que fue de los mejores puertos de su epoca. Construyo palacios, teatro, hipodromo, baños romanos y todo al mejor estilo de la epoca con la mas avanzada tecnologia del momento. </p>
<p><a href="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20200701_091237-scaled.jpg" data-elementor-open-lightbox="yes" data-elementor-lightbox-title="20200701_091237"><br />
<img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="1024" height="1024" src="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20200701_091237-1024x1024.jpg" alt="" loading="lazy" srcset="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20200701_091237-1024x1024.jpg 1024w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20200701_091237-300x300.jpg 300w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20200701_091237-150x150.jpg 150w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20200701_091237-768x768.jpg 768w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20200701_091237-1536x1536.jpg 1536w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20200701_091237-2048x2048.jpg 2048w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20200701_091237-600x600.jpg 600w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20200701_091237-200x200.jpg 200w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 1024px) 100vw, 1024px">								</a><br />
<a href="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20200527_094553-scaled.jpg" data-elementor-open-lightbox="yes" data-elementor-lightbox-title="20200527_094553"><br />
<img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="1024" height="1024" src="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20200527_094553-1024x1024.jpg" alt="" loading="lazy" srcset="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20200527_094553-1024x1024.jpg 1024w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20200527_094553-300x300.jpg 300w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20200527_094553-150x150.jpg 150w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20200527_094553-768x768.jpg 768w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20200527_094553-1536x1536.jpg 1536w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20200527_094553-2048x2048.jpg 2048w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20200527_094553-600x600.jpg 600w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20200527_094553-200x200.jpg 200w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 1024px) 100vw, 1024px">								</a></p>
<h3>Haifa</h3>
<p>La ciudad industrial con el puerto que construyo el imperio britanico para sacar por aqui el petroleo del medio oriente. Hasta hoy se puede observar la industria petroquimica enclavada en su bahia.</p>
<p><a href="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20200701_085906-scaled.jpg" data-elementor-open-lightbox="yes" data-elementor-lightbox-title="20200701_085906"><br />
<img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="1024" height="1024" src="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20200701_085906-1024x1024.jpg" alt="" loading="lazy" srcset="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20200701_085906-1024x1024.jpg 1024w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20200701_085906-300x300.jpg 300w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20200701_085906-150x150.jpg 150w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20200701_085906-768x768.jpg 768w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20200701_085906-1536x1536.jpg 1536w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20200701_085906-2048x2048.jpg 2048w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20200701_085906-600x600.jpg 600w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20200701_085906-200x200.jpg 200w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 1024px) 100vw, 1024px">								</a><br />
<a href="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210227_131840-scaled.jpg" data-elementor-open-lightbox="yes" data-elementor-lightbox-title="20210227_131840"><br />
<img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="576" height="1024" src="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210227_131840-576x1024.jpg" alt="" loading="lazy" srcset="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210227_131840-576x1024.jpg 576w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210227_131840-169x300.jpg 169w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210227_131840-768x1365.jpg 768w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210227_131840-864x1536.jpg 864w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210227_131840-1152x2048.jpg 1152w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210227_131840-600x1067.jpg 600w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210227_131840-scaled.jpg 1440w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 576px) 100vw, 576px">								</a></p>
<p>El monte carmelo desde lo alto. Recordaremos la biblia, de acuerdo con las escrituras el profeta Elias paso por aqui venciendo a los sacercedotes del dios Baal.</p>
<p><a href="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20201123_141733-scaled.jpg" data-elementor-open-lightbox="yes" data-elementor-lightbox-title="20201123_141733"><br />
<img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="1024" height="1024" src="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20201123_141733-1024x1024.jpg" alt="" loading="lazy" srcset="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20201123_141733-1024x1024.jpg 1024w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20201123_141733-300x300.jpg 300w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20201123_141733-150x150.jpg 150w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20201123_141733-768x768.jpg 768w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20201123_141733-1536x1536.jpg 1536w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20201123_141733-2048x2048.jpg 2048w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20201123_141733-600x600.jpg 600w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20201123_141733-200x200.jpg 200w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 1024px) 100vw, 1024px">								</a></p>
<h2>Dia 3 Meguido y Nazaret</h2>
<p>Nazaret el lugar donde el cristianismo empezo y meguido, el lugar de la ultima batalla en la apocalipsis.</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="576" height="1024" src="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_133948-576x1024.jpg" alt="" loading="lazy" srcset="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_133948-576x1024.jpg 576w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_133948-169x300.jpg 169w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_133948-768x1365.jpg 768w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_133948-864x1536.jpg 864w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_133948-1152x2048.jpg 1152w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_133948-600x1067.jpg 600w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_133948-scaled.jpg 1440w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 576px) 100vw, 576px"><br />
<img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="576" height="1024" src="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_111514-576x1024.jpg" alt="" loading="lazy" srcset="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_111514-576x1024.jpg 576w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_111514-169x300.jpg 169w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_111514-768x1365.jpg 768w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_111514-864x1536.jpg 864w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_111514-1152x2048.jpg 1152w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_111514-600x1067.jpg 600w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_111514-scaled.jpg 1440w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 576px) 100vw, 576px"><br />
<img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="576" height="1024" src="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_103608-576x1024.jpg" alt="" loading="lazy" srcset="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_103608-576x1024.jpg 576w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_103608-169x300.jpg 169w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_103608-768x1365.jpg 768w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_103608-864x1536.jpg 864w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_103608-1152x2048.jpg 1152w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_103608-600x1067.jpg 600w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_103608-scaled.jpg 1440w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 576px) 100vw, 576px"><br />
<a href="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_134051-scaled.jpg" data-elementor-open-lightbox="yes" data-elementor-lightbox-title="20210609_134051"><br />
<img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="576" height="1024" src="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_134051-576x1024.jpg" alt="" loading="lazy" srcset="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_134051-576x1024.jpg 576w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_134051-169x300.jpg 169w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_134051-768x1365.jpg 768w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_134051-864x1536.jpg 864w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_134051-1152x2048.jpg 1152w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_134051-600x1067.jpg 600w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_134051-scaled.jpg 1440w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 576px) 100vw, 576px">								</a><br />
<a href="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_134150-scaled.jpg" data-elementor-open-lightbox="yes" data-elementor-lightbox-title="20210609_134150"><br />
<img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="576" height="1024" src="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_134150-576x1024.jpg" alt="" loading="lazy" srcset="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_134150-576x1024.jpg 576w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_134150-169x300.jpg 169w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_134150-768x1365.jpg 768w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_134150-864x1536.jpg 864w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_134150-1152x2048.jpg 1152w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_134150-600x1067.jpg 600w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_134150-scaled.jpg 1440w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 576px) 100vw, 576px">								</a></p>
<p>Esta es la fuente de agua de la ciudad. Quizas la misma fuente de la que se cuenta que Maria la madre de Jesus vio el angel que le anuncio su embarazo.</p>
<p>Las dos iglesias que se reparten los fieles, Griega ortodoxa y catolica.</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="576" height="1024" src="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_112311-576x1024.jpg" alt="" loading="lazy" srcset="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_112311-576x1024.jpg 576w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_112311-169x300.jpg 169w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_112311-768x1365.jpg 768w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_112311-864x1536.jpg 864w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_112311-1152x2048.jpg 1152w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_112311-600x1067.jpg 600w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210609_112311-scaled.jpg 1440w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 576px) 100vw, 576px"></p>

				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>

body #load {
  display: block;
  height: 100%;
  overflow: hidden;
  position: fixed;
  width: 100%;
  z-index: 9901;
  opacity: 1;
  visibility: visible;
  transition: all .35s ease-out;
}
.load-wrap {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  background-position: center center;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  text-align: center;
}
.load-wrap > svg {
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%,-50%);
}
#load {
  background-color: #ffffff;
}

  fill: #fdc134;
}
.uil-ring > path {
  fill: #fdc134;
}

  fill: #fdc134;
}
.ring-loader .moving-circle {
  fill: #fdc134;
}
.uil-hourglass .glass {
  stroke: #fdc134;
}
.uil-hourglass .sand {
  fill: #fdc134;
}

<article id="post-248" class="circle-fancy-style post-248 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail category-jerusalem tag-protestantes category-19 description-off">

	<div class="post-thumbnail"><div class="fancy-date"><a title="6:18 am" href="https://josenisraeltours.net/2021/09/09/"><span class="entry-month">Sep</span><span class="entry-date updated">9</span><span class="entry-year">2021</span></a></div><span class="fancy-categories"><a href="https://josenisraeltours.net/category/jerusalem/" rel="category tag">Jerusalem</a></span><img class="preload-me lazy-load" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%20viewBox%3D'0%200%201420%20710'%2F%3E" data-src="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210328_105024-scaled-e1631171843142-1420x710.jpg" data-srcset="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210328_105024-scaled-e1631171843142-1420x710.jpg 1420w" width="1420" height="710"  title="20210328_105024" alt="" /></div><div class="entry-content">		<div data-elementor-type="wp-post" data-elementor-id="248" class="elementor elementor-248" data-elementor-post-type="post">

			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-de60462 elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="de60462" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h3 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">La Iglesia del Redentor</h3>				</div>
				</div>
					</div>
		</div>
					</div>
		</section>
				<section class="elementor-section elementor-top-section elementor-element elementor-element-510a2ff elementor-section-boxed elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default" data-id="510a2ff" data-element_type="section">
						<div class="elementor-container elementor-column-gap-default">
					<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-50 elementor-top-column elementor-element elementor-element-e59cf45" data-id="e59cf45" data-element_type="column">
			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-f882b7d elementor-widget elementor-widget-image" data-id="f882b7d" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="image.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
															<img fetchpriority="high" decoding="async" width="806" height="1024" src="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210328_105024-scaled-e1631171843142-806x1024.jpg" class="attachment-large size-large wp-image-249" alt="" srcset="/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210328_105024-scaled-e1631171843142-806x1024.jpg 806w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210328_105024-scaled-e1631171843142-236x300.jpg 236w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210328_105024-scaled-e1631171843142-768x976.jpg 768w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210328_105024-scaled-e1631171843142-1209x1536.jpg 1209w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210328_105024-scaled-e1631171843142-600x762.jpg 600w, /wp-content/uploads/2021/09/20210328_105024-scaled-e1631171843142.jpg 1420w" sizes="(max-width: 806px) 100vw, 806px" />															</div>
				</div>
					</div>
		</div>
				<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-50 elementor-top-column elementor-element elementor-element-225e9d2" data-id="225e9d2" data-element_type="column">
			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-372b47e elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="372b47e" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>No todos los dias llega el Emperador aleman junto con la Emperadora a Jerusalem a consagrar una iglesia protestante. La iglesia del redentor fue consagrada por Wilhem II y Augusta Victoria en 1898. Jerusalem se vistio de fiesta para la ocasion. Subir los escalones del campanario en una azaña para los mas valientes.</p>								</div>
				</div>
					</div>
		</div>
					</div>
		</section>
				<section class="elementor-section elementor-top-section elementor-element elementor-element-36fc466 elementor-section-boxed elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default" data-id="36fc466" data-element_type="section">
						<div class="elementor-container elementor-column-gap-default">
					<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-100 elementor-top-column elementor-element elementor-element-1ae239e" data-id="1ae239e" data-element_type="column">
			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-74f8ccb elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="74f8ccb" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>Para recibir a las autoridades alemanas Jerusalem se visitio de fiesta. El foso que rodeaba la mal llamada ciudadela de David fue tapado por las autoridades para que la comitiva del Emperador pueda entrar en la ciudad con sus carruajes. Eran dias de cambio en la ciudad, el imperio otomano perdia ya su fuerza y los estados Europeos buscaban la forma de formar parte de la ciudad santa. Compraban predios y construian sus iglesias. La segunda mitad del siglo XIX fue el auge de una ciudad que hasta entonces estuvo olvidada y perdida en el tiempo.</p>								</div>
				</div>
					</div>
		</div>
					</div>
		</section>

				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>

				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );

body #load {
  display: block;
  height: 100%;
  overflow: hidden;
  position: fixed;
  width: 100%;
  z-index: 9901;
  opacity: 1;
  visibility: visible;
  transition: all .35s ease-out;
}
.load-wrap {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  background-position: center center;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  text-align: center;
}
.load-wrap > svg {
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%,-50%);
}
#load {
  background-color: #ffffff;
}
.uil-default rect:not(.bk) {
  fill: #fdc134;
}
.uil-ring > path {
  fill: #fdc134;
}
.ring-loader .circle {
  fill: #fdc134;
}
.ring-loader .moving-circle {
  fill: #fdc134;
}
.uil-hourglass .glass {
  stroke: #fdc134;
}
.uil-hourglass .sand {
  fill: #fdc134;
}

				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );

  display: block;
  height: 100%;
  overflow: hidden;
  position: fixed;
  width: 100%;
  z-index: 9901;
  opacity: 1;
  visibility: visible;
  transition: all .35s ease-out;
}
.load-wrap {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  background-position: center center;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  text-align: center;
}
.load-wrap > svg {
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%,-50%);

					<script>
				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>

body #load {
  display: block;
  height: 100%;
  overflow: hidden;
  position: fixed;
  width: 100%;
  z-index: 9901;
  opacity: 1;
  visibility: visible;
  transition: all .35s ease-out;
}
.load-wrap {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  background-position: center center;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  text-align: center;
}
.load-wrap > svg {
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%,-50%);
}
#load {
  background-color: #ffffff;
}

  fill: #fdc134;
}
.uil-hourglass .glass {
  stroke: #fdc134;
}
.uil-hourglass .sand {
  fill: #fdc134;
}

body #load {
  display: block;
  height: 100%;
  overflow: hidden;
  position: fixed;
  width: 100%;
  z-index: 9901;
  opacity: 1;
  visibility: visible;
  transition: all .35s ease-out;
}
.load-wrap {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  background-position: center center;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  text-align: center;
}
.load-wrap > svg {
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%,-50%);
}
#load {
  background-color: #ffffff;
}

}
.ring-loader .moving-circle {
  fill: #fdc134;
}
.uil-hourglass .glass {
  stroke: #fdc134;
}
.uil-hourglass .sand {
  fill: #fdc134;
}

			<div class="entry-meta"><span class="category-link"><a href="https://josenisraeltours.net/category/jerusalem/" >Jerusalem</a></span><a class="author vcard" href="https://josenisraeltours.net/author/joselito/" title="View all posts by Jose Hollander" rel="author">By <span class="fn">Jose Hollander</span></a><a href="https://josenisraeltours.net/2021/09/10/" title="1:39 pm" class="data-link" rel="bookmark"><time class="entry-date updated" datetime="2021-09-10T13:39:08+00:00">September 10, 2021</time></a></div><p>Sinagoga Hurva La palabra “Hurva” en español significa ruina. No parece un ruina la hermosa sinagoga, las mas elegante hasta hoy dentro de las murallas de Jerusalem Hoy se ve una gran sinagoga, muy elegante, fue reconstruida de acuerdo a los planos originales de principio del siglo XX en el año 2005. El edificio anterior…</p>

body #load {
  display: block;
  height: 100%;
  overflow: hidden;
  position: fixed;
  width: 100%;
  z-index: 9901;
  opacity: 1;
  visibility: visible;
  transition: all .35s ease-out;
}
.load-wrap {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  background-position: center center;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  text-align: center;
}
.load-wrap > svg {
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%,-50%);

				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );

			</button>

			</button>

	</div>
</div>

				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>

  display: block;
  height: 100%;
  overflow: hidden;
  position: fixed;
  width: 100%;
  z-index: 9901;
  opacity: 1;
  visibility: visible;
  transition: all .35s ease-out;

  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  background-position: center center;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  text-align: center;

  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;

				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>

body #load {
  display: block;
  height: 100%;
  overflow: hidden;
  position: fixed;
  width: 100%;
  z-index: 9901;
  opacity: 1;
  visibility: visible;
  transition: all .35s ease-out;
}
.load-wrap {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  background-position: center center;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  text-align: center;
}
.load-wrap > svg {
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%,-50%);
}
#load {
  background-color: #ffffff;
}

}
.ring-loader .moving-circle {
  fill: #fdc134;
}
.uil-hourglass .glass {
  stroke: #fdc134;
}
.uil-hourglass .sand {
  fill: #fdc134;
}

					<script>
				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>

  visibility: visible;

					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {

body #load {
  display: block;
  height: 100%;
  overflow: hidden;
  position: fixed;
  width: 100%;
  z-index: 9901;
  opacity: 1;
  visibility: visible;
  transition: all .35s ease-out;
}
.load-wrap {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  background-position: center center;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  text-align: center;
}
.load-wrap > svg {
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%,-50%);
}
#load {
  background-color: #ffffff;
}
.uil-default rect:not(.bk) {
  fill: #fdc134;
}
.uil-ring > path {
  fill: #fdc134;
}
.ring-loader .circle {
  fill: #fdc134;
}
.ring-loader .moving-circle {
  fill: #fdc134;
}
.uil-hourglass .glass {
  stroke: #fdc134;
}
.uil-hourglass .sand {
  fill: #fdc134;
}

					<script>
				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>
